question: If \(\vec{P} / \vec{Q}\), the angle between maximum resultant and minimum resultant is
explanation: Maximum resultant (P+Q) and minimum resultant (|P-Q|) are collinear but in opposite directions. Hence angle between them is 180°.

question: A train 110m length is traveling at 60km/hr. The time at which a man walking at 6km/hr in opposite direction pass the train is
explanation: Relative speed = 66 km/h = 55/3 m/s. Time = 110 / (55/3) = 6 s (approx 5.4 s in options).

question: An artificial satellite moving in a circular orbit at a distance h from the center of earth has total energy E₀. Its potential energy is
explanation: Total energy E = -KE, PE = -2KE → PE = 2E₀ (since E₀ is negative).
